<html lang="en"><head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Vanillarogers — Blog & Gallery</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <script src="https://code.iconify.design/3/3.1.0/iconify.min.js"></script>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          fontFamily: {
            inter: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
            playfair: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'],
          },
          colors: {
            cream: { 50: '#FFFDF7', 100: '#FFF9E8', 200: '#FFF3D1', 300: '#FFE9B3', 400: '#FFDB85' },
            vanilla: { 500: '#D4A843', 600: '#C49530', 700: '#A67C20' },
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; overflow-x: hidden; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #FFF9E8; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #D4A843; border-radius: 3px; }

    @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
    @keyframes slideDown { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
    @keyframes float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(3deg); } }
    @keyframes shimmer { 0% { background-position: -200% 0; } 100% { background-position: 200% 0; } }
    @keyframes scaleIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } }
    @keyframes marquee { 0% { transform: translateX(0); } 100% { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

    .animate-fadeInUp { animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease forwards; }
    .animate-fadeIn { animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease forwards; }
    .animate-float { animation: float 6s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .animate-marquee { animation: marquee 30s linear infinite; }
    .stagger-1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; opacity: 0; }
    .stagger-2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; opacity: 0; }
    .stagger-3 { animation-delay: 0.3s; opacity: 0; }
    .stagger-4 { animation-delay: 0.4s; opacity: 0; }
    .stagger-5 { animation-delay: 0.5s; opacity: 0; }
    .stagger-6 { animation-delay: 0.6s; opacity: 0; }

    .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0, 1); }
    .reveal.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    .reveal-left { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-40px); transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0, 1); }
    .reveal-left.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
    .reveal-right { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0, 1); }
    .reveal-right.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }

    .blog-card { transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); }
    .blog-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.15); }
    .blog-card:hover .card-img { transform: scale(1.08); }
    .blog-card:hover .card-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }
    .card-img { transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); }
    .card-arrow { transition: transform 0.3s ease; }

    .cat-pill { transition: all 0.3s ease; }
    .cat-pill.active { background: #0F172A; color: #FFFFFF; }
    .cat-pill:not(.active):hover { background: #FFF3D1; color: #0F172A; }

    .search-overlay { transition: all 0.3s ease; }
    .search-overlay.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
    .search-overlay.visible { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }

    .mobile-menu { transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); }
    .mobile-menu.closed { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; }
    .mobile-menu.open { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; }

    .shimmer-badge { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #D4A843 0%, #FFE9B3 40%, #D4A843 80%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: shimmer 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

    .toast { position: fixed; bottom: 30px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(100px); transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; opacity: 0; z-index: 9999; }
    .toast.show { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); opacity: 1; }

    .marquee-mask { mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, black 10%, black 90%, transparent); -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, black 10%, black 90%, transparent); }
    .heading-serif { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; }
    .newsletter-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.3); }
    .back-to-top { transition: all 0.3s ease; }
    .back-to-top.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transform: translateY(20px); }
    .back-to-top.visible { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; transform: translateY(0); }

    /* Gallery specific */
    .gallery-tab { transition: all 0.3s ease; }
    .gallery-tab.active { background: #0F172A; color: #FFFFFF; }
    .gallery-tab:not(.active):hover { background: #FFF3D1; }

    .gallery-item { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 16px; position: relative; cursor: pointer; }
    .gallery-item img { transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), filter 0.5s ease; }
    .gallery-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.08); }
    .gallery-item .gallery-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 50%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s ease; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; padding: 20px; }
    .gallery-item:hover .gallery-overlay { opacity: 1; }

    .gallery-grid-item { transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); }
    .gallery-grid-item.hiding { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); }
    .gallery-grid-item.showing { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }

    /* Lightbox */
    .lightbox { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 60; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.4s ease; }
    .lightbox.open { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
    .lightbox img { max-width: 90vw; max-height: 85vh; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 12px; transform: scale(0.9); transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); }
    .lightbox.open img { transform: scale(1); }
    .lightbox-btn { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; }
    .lightbox-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
    .lightbox-close { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; }
    .lightbox-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
    .lightbox-counter { position: absolute; bottom: 24px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; }
    .lightbox-caption { position: absolute; bottom: 50px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); color: white; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 18px; text-align: center; max-width: 600px; }
  </style>

<body>

  <!-- TOAST -->
  <div id="toast" class="toast bg-slate-900 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-xl flex items-center gap-3">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:check-circle" data-width="18" class="iconify text-emerald-400 iconify--lucide"><g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335"></path><path d="m9 11l3 3L22 4"></path></g></svg>
    <span id="toast-msg" class="text-sm font-medium">Message sent!</span>
  </div>

  <!-- LIGHTBOX -->
  <div id="lightbox" class="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox(event)">
    <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox(event)">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:x" data-width="22" class="iconify text-white iconify--lucide"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"></path></svg>
    </button>
    <button class="lightbox-btn" style="left: 20px;" onclick="navigateLightbox(-1, event)">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:chevron-left" data-width="24" class="iconify text-white iconify--lucide"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="m15 18l-6-6l6-6"></path></svg>
    </button>
    <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="Gallery image">
    <button class="lightbox-btn" style="right: 20px;" onclick="navigateLightbox(1, event)">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:chevron-right" data-width="24" class="iconify text-white iconify--lucide"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="m9 18l6-6l-6-6"></path></svg>
    </button>
    <div id="lightboxCaption" class="lightbox-caption"></div>
    <div id="lightboxCounter" class="lightbox-counter"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- SEARCH OVERLAY -->
  <div id="searchOverlay" class="search-overlay hidden fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-start justify-center pt-32">
    <div class="w-full max-w-2xl px-6">
      <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
        <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Search Articles</span>
        <button onclick="toggleSearch()" class="p-2 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-full transition-colors">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:x" data-width="24" class="iconify text-slate-600 iconify--lucide"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"></path></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="relative">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:search" data-width="24" class="iconify absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 iconify--lucide"><g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"><path d="m21 21l-4.34-4.34"></path><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"></circle></g></svg>
        <input id="searchInput" type="text" placeholder="Type to search..." class="w-full pl-14 pr-6 py-5 text-2xl md:text-3xl font-light border-b-2 border-slate-200 focus:border-vanilla-500 focus:outline-none bg-transparent transition-colors" oninput="handleSearch(this.value)">
      </div>
      <div id="searchResults" class="mt-8 space-y-4"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" data-icon="lucide:x" data-width="24" class="iconify text-slate-600 iconify--lucide"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"></path></svg>
        </button>

  </button>

  <script>
    // === GALLERY DATA ===
    const galleryData = [
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-seedling-nursery/1200/1600.jpg', caption: 'Vanilla Seedling Nursery — Young orchids ready for transplanting' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/tropical-farm-planting/1200/2400.jpg', caption: 'Planting Along Support Trees — Vanilla vines climb shade trees in Namanve' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/hands-soil-planting/1200/900.jpg', caption: 'Preparing Soil — Rich, organic soil is key to healthy vines' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/green-vanilla-leaves/1200/1200.jpg', caption: 'Healthy Vanilla Vines — Lush green growth in Kiwanga' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/farmer-planting-field/1200/1500.jpg', caption: 'Morning Planting Rounds — Early mornings on Matovu Road farms' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-beans-drying-rack/2400/1800.jpg', caption: 'Sun-Drying Vanilla Beans — Controlled drying is a critical curing step' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-sweating-blanket/1200/1200.jpg', caption: 'The Sweating Process — Wrapped in blankets to develop flavor compounds' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/hands-sorting-beans/1200/1600.jpg', caption: 'Sorting & Grading — Each bean is inspected for quality' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-cured-brown/1200/900.jpg', caption: 'Perfectly Cured Beans — Dark, supple, and intensely fragrant' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-conditioning-box/1200/1200.jpg', caption: 'Conditioning Boxes — Slow aging for peak vanillin development' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/bundling-vanilla-twine/1200/1600.jpg', caption: 'Bundling for Market — Beans tied by length and grade' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-market-stall/1200/1200.jpg', caption: 'Local Market Day — Selling directly to buyers in Mukono' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-packaging-luxury/2400/1800.jpg', caption: 'Premium Packaging — Each bundle carefully packed for export quality' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-export-shipping/1200/1600.jpg', caption: 'Ready for Export — Ugandan vanilla heading to global markets' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/buyer-inspecting-vanilla/1200/1200.jpg', caption: 'Buyer Inspections — Quality checks before purchase' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-trade-fair/1200/900.jpg', caption: 'Agricultural Trade Fair — Showcasing Ugandan vanilla to world' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/happy-farmers-payment/1200/1600.jpg', caption: 'Fair Trade Payments — Ensuring every farmer gets a fair price' },
      { src: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/vanilla-product-display/1200/1200.jpg', caption: 'Product Display — From beans to extract, full range' },
    ];

    let currentLightboxIndex = 0;
    let visibleGalleryItems = [...galleryData];

    // === LIGHTBOX ===
    function openLightbox(index) {
      // Find visible items
      const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-grid-item:not(.hiding)');
      const visibleIndices = [];
      items.forEach(item => {
        const allItems = [...document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-grid-item')];
        visibleIndices.push(allItems.indexOf(item));
      });
      if (visibleIndices.length === 0) return;
      
      // Map clicked item's data index
      const clickedItem = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-grid-item')[index];
      // Find which visible position this is
      const visiblePos = [...items].indexOf(clickedItem);
      
      currentLightboxIndex = visiblePos;
      visibleGalleryItems = visibleIndices.map(i => galleryData[i]);

      updateLightbox();
      document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    }

    function closeLightbox(e) {
      if (e.target === document.getElementById('lightbox') || e.currentTarget.classList.contains('lightbox-close')) {
        document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
        document.body.style.overflow = '';
      }
    }

    function navigateLightbox(dir, e) {
      if (e) e.stopPropagation();
      currentLightboxIndex = (currentLightboxIndex + dir + visibleGalleryItems.length) % visibleGalleryItems.length;
      updateLightbox();
    }

    function updateLightbox() {
      const data = visibleGalleryItems[currentLightboxIndex];
      document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = data.src;
      document.getElementById('lightboxCaption').textContent = data.caption;
      document.getElementById('lightboxCounter').textContent = `${currentLightboxIndex + 1} / ${visibleGalleryItems.length}`;
    }

    // Keyboard nav for lightbox
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      const lb = document.getElementById('lightbox');
      if (!lb.classList.contains('open')) return;
      if (e.key === 'Escape') { lb.classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') navigateLightbox(-1);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') navigateLightbox(1);
    });

    // === GALLERY FILTER ===
    function filterGallery(category, btn) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');

      const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-grid-item');
      let count = 0;

      items.forEach((item, i) => {
        const cat = item.getAttribute('data-gcat');
        if (category === 'all' || cat === category) {
          item.classList.remove('hiding');
          item.style.display = '';
          item.style.opacity = '0';
          item.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
          setTimeout(() => {
            item.style.transition = 'all 0.5s ease';
            item.style.opacity = '1';
            item.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
          }, 50 * count);
          count++;
        } else {
          item.style.transition = 'all 0.3s ease';
          item.style.opacity = '0';
          item.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
          item.classList.add('hiding');
          setTimeout(() => { item.style.display = 'none'; }, 300);
        }
      });

      document.getElementById('galleryCount').textContent = count;
    }

    // === TOAST ===
    function showToast(msg) {
      const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
      document.getElementById('toast-msg').textContent = msg;
      toast.classList.add('show');
      setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 3000);
    }

    // === SEARCH ===
    function toggleSearch() {
      const overlay = document.getElementById('searchOverlay');
      if (overlay.classList.contains('hidden')) {
        overlay.classList.remove('hidden'); overlay.classList.add('visible');
        document.getElementById('searchInput').focus(); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      } else {
        overlay.classList.add('hidden'); overlay.classList.remove('visible');
        document.getElementById('searchInput').value = ''; document.getElementById('searchResults').innerHTML = '';
        document.body.style.overflow = '';
      }
    }

    const articles = [
      { title: 'The Art of Vanilla Curing: A Mukono Farmer\'s Journey', cat: 'Farming', date: 'Dec 15, 2024' },
      { title: 'Hand-Pollination: Why Vanilla Needs the Human Touch', cat: 'Farming', date: 'Dec 10, 2024' },
      { title: 'Ugandan Vanilla Bean Cake: A Local Twist on a Classic', cat: 'Recipes', date: 'Dec 5, 2024' },
      { title: 'Life in Namanve: How Vanilla Changed Our Community', cat: 'Culture', date: 'Nov 28, 2024' },
      { title: 'Understanding Vanilla Prices: A 2025 Market Outlook', cat: 'Business', date: 'Nov 20, 2024' },
      { title: 'No-Churn Vanilla Ice Cream with Real Bean Paste', cat: 'Recipes', date: 'Nov 15, 2024' },
      { title: 'Building Perfect Shade House for Vanilla Vines', cat: 'Farming', date: 'Nov 8, 2024' },
    ];

    function handleSearch(query) {
      const results = document.getElementById('searchResults');
      if (query.length < 2) { results.innerHTML = ''; return; }
      const filtered = articles.filter(a => a.title.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) || a.cat.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()));
      if (filtered.length === 0) { results.innerHTML = '<p class="text-slate-400 text-sm">No articles found.</p>'; return; }
      results.innerHTML = filtered.map(a => `
        <a href="#articles" onclick="toggleSearch()" class="block p-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-cream-50 transition-colors border border-transparent hover:border-slate-100">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1"><span class="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-vanilla-600 bg-cream-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">${a.cat}</span><span class="text-xs text-slate-400">${a.date}</span></div>
          <h4 class="text-base font-medium text-slate-900 heading-serif">${a.title}</h4>
        </a>
      `).join('');
    }

    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') { const o = document.getElementById('searchOverlay'); if (!o.classList.contains('hidden')) toggleSearch(); }
    });

    // === MOBILE MENU ===
    function toggleMobile() {
      const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
      if (menu.classList.contains('closed')) { menu.classList.remove('closed'); menu.classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; }
      else { menu.classList.add('closed'); menu.classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
    }

    // === CATEGORY FILTER ===
    function filterPosts(category, btn) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.cat-pill').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
      if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
      const cards = document.querySelectorAll('#postsGrid .blog-card');
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const cat = card.getAttribute('data-category');
        if (category === 'all' || cat === category) {
          card.style.display = ''; card.style.opacity = '0'; card.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
          setTimeout(() => { card.style.transition = 'all 0.5s ease'; card.style.opacity = '1'; card.style.transform = 'translateY(0)'; }, 50);
        } else {
          card.style.transition = 'all 0.3s ease'; card.style.opacity = '0'; card.style.transform = 'translateY(10px)';
          setTimeout(() => { card.style.display = 'none'; }, 300);
        }
      });
    }

    // === LIKE ===
    function toggleLike(btn) {
      const countEl = btn.querySelector('.like-count');
      let count = parseInt(countEl.textContent);
      if (btn.classList.contains('liked')) { btn.classList.remove('liked', 'text-red-500'); countEl.textContent = count - 1; }
      else { btn.classList.add('liked', 'text-red-500'); countEl.textContent = count + 1; btn.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)'; setTimeout(() => btn.style.transform = 'scale(1)'), 200; }
    }

    // === FORMS ===
    function handleNewsletter(e) { e.preventDefault(); showToast('🎉 Subscribed! Welcome to Vanillarogers.'); e.target.reset(); }
    function handleContact(e) { e.preventDefault(); showToast('✅ Message sent! We\'ll get back to you soon.'); e.target.reset(); }

    // === SCROLL REVEAL ===
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add('active'); }); }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

    // === NAVBAR SCROLL ===
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const scrollY = window.scrollY;
      document.getElementById('navbar').style.boxShadow = scrollY > 50 ? '0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)' : 'none';
      const btn = document.getElementById('backToTop');
      if (scrollY > 600) { btn.classList.remove('hidden'); btn.classList.add('visible'); }
      else { btn.classList.add('hidden'); btn.classList.remove('visible'); }
    });

    // === SMOOTH SCROLL ===
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
      anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
        if (target) { e.preventDefault(); target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }
      });
    });
  </script>
